name: Cowork Cookbook
summary: The Cowork Cookbook as a vTwin rapplication: a specialized twin that turns Microsoft Copilot Cowork recipes into single-file agents with WorkIQ access. Loaded the RAPP Agent Console way — one exported agent.py pulls the portable .egg cartridge and the brainstem spins it up as its own running twin (own port + workspace), collaborated with over twin-chat.
tagline: A cookbook cartridge that hatches as its own twin.
license: MIT (loader + converter) / CC-BY-4.0 (recipe content, © its authors)

console.note: Export only the loader agent.py. It pulls the .egg from egg_url, unpacks it fully, and the local brainstem hatches it as a twin on its own port.
